title: A home for the future of Austrian football thanks to support from FIFA Forward
summary: The long wait is finally over. After 28 years, Austria are returning to football’s biggest stage as their national team will compete at the FIFA World Cup™ for the first time since 1998.
full_text: The long wait is finally over. After 28 years, Austria are returning to football’s biggest stage as their national team will compete at the FIFA World Cup™ for the first time since 1998.
why: Austria returns to the FIFA World Cup after 28 years.
headline: Austria Returns to FIFA World Cup After 28-Year Absence
ai_summary: অস্ট্রিয়ার জাতীয় দল আবার সবচেয়ে বড় পর্দায় ফিরে আসছে, যারা ১৯৯৮ সালের পর থেকে ফিফা বিশ্বকাপে প্রথমবার প্রতিদ্বন্দ্বিতা করছে। এই ঐতিহাসিক মুহূর্ত আসে অনুমান করে যাওয়ার পর ২৮ বছর পর। তাদের সাফল্যের কৃতিত্ব ফিফা ফরোয়ার্ডের সমর্থনের।
facebook_caption: The wait is finally over for Austrian football fans as their national team returns to the FIFA World Cup after 28 years. This achievement marks a significant milestone in the country's football history. Austria's success is a testament to the impact of FIFA Forward, a program supporting football development worldwide.
instagram_caption:
Austria's back! 🇦🇹 After 28 years, they're returning to the FIFA World Cup stage.

Their historic moment is made possible thanks to FIFA Forward's support.

Let's celebrate Austrian football's comeback! 💪

meta_description: Austria returns to the FIFA World Cup after 28 years, thanks to support from FIFA Forward.

The Austrian team's colors, red and white, dominate the scene, with players and fans dressed in their jerseys, celebrating and cheering in the foreground. title: Chile participate in FIFA Series 2026™ with long-term goal in mind
summary: Chile face host nation New Zealand and Cabo Verde, both of which are FIFA World Cup-bound, in Auckland. Head coach Nicolás Córdova discusses national team's progress, youth development and importance of international competition .
full_text: Chile face host nation New Zealand and Cabo Verde, both of which are FIFA World Cup-bound, in Auckland. Head coach Nicolás Córdova discusses national team's progress, youth development and importance of international competition .

title: Austria earn first World Cup win in 36 years with victory over debutants Jordan
summary: Austria won their first World Cup game in 36 years with a 3-1 Group J victory over tournament debutants Jordan in San Francisco.
full_text: Austria won their first World Cup game in 36 years with a 3-1 Group J victory over tournament debutants Jordan in San Francisco.
why: Austria win their first World Cup game in 36 years.
headline: Austria Secure Historic 1st World Cup Win in 36 Years!
ai_summary: অস্ট্রিয়ার খেলোয়াড়রা সান ফ্রান্সিসকোতে জর্ডানকে ৩-১ গোলে পরাজিত করে একটি বড় মাইলফলক উদযাপন করেছে। এ জয়টি অস্ট্রিয়ার জন্য ৩৬ বছরের প্রথম ফিফা বিশ্বকাপে জয়ের শুরু হিসেবে চিহ্নিত হয়েছে, এটি দলের কঠোর কাজ এবং পদক্ষেপের একটি সাক্ষ্য।
facebook_caption: Austria's football team has made history by securing their first World Cup game win in 36 years! With a thrilling 3-1 victory over Jordan in San Francisco, the team has proven their mettle on the world stage. This win is a significant achievement for Austria, marking a new era of success for the team.

title: ‘New chapter’ for Cameroonian football as FECAFOOT headquarters inaugurated
summary: FIFA President Gianni Infantino has said the new Cameroonian Football Federation (FECAFOOT) headquarters will open “a new chapter in the great history” of the African country’s football development.
full_text: FIFA President Gianni Infantino has said the new Cameroonian Football Federation (FECAFOOT) headquarters will open “a new chapter in the great history” of the African country’s football development.
why: FIFA President Gianni Infantino inaugurates new Cameroonian Football Federation headquarters
headline: New FECAFOOT HQ Opens in Cameroon, Football's Future Bright
ai_summary: ফিফা প্রেজিডেন্ট জিয়ানি ইনফ্যান্তিনো কে নতুন ক্যামেরুনীয় ফুটবল ফেডারেশন (FECAFOOT) হেডকোয়ার্টার কে আনুষ্ঠানিকভাবে উদ্বোধন করেছেন।  নতুন সুবিধাটি দেশের ফুটবল উন্নয়নে একটি গুরুত্বপূর্ণ মাইলফলক দ্বারা চিহ্নিত করে, যাতে ইনফ্যান্তিনোকে রাষ্ট্রের ফুটবল ইতিহাসের 'নতুন অধ্যায়' হিসাবে ডাকতে হয়েছিল।
facebook_caption: We're thrilled to announce that the new FECAFOOT headquarters has finally opened its doors in Cameroon! 🌟 FIFA President Gianni Infantino was on hand to officially inaugurate the facility, marking a major milestone in the country's football development. The new headquarters is a testament to Cameroon's rich football heritage and its commitment to nurturing the next generation of football stars.
instagram_caption: 🌟 New FECAFOOT HQ Opens in Cameroon! 🏆 FIFA President Gianni Infantino inaugurates the new facility, ushering in a new era for Cameroonian football. 💪
twitter_caption: FIFA President Gianni Infantino inaugurates new FECAFOOT HQ in Cameroon, marking a new chapter in the country's football history. 🏆 #CameroonFootball #FIFA #FECAFOOT
poster_text: ফেডারেশন ক্যামেরুনীয় ফুটবল কর্তৃপক্ষ (FECAFOOT) সদর দপ্তর ক্যামেরুনে উদ্বোধন করা হয়েছে।
meta_description: FIFA President Gianni Infantino inaugurates new FECAFOOT headquarters in Cameroon, marking a new chapter in the country's football history.

title: FIFA U-20 Women's World Cup
summary: Nurturing the brightest talents in international women's football. With continental qualification pathways leading to an exciting finals event, the competition has seen five past champions; USA, Germany, Japan, Korea DPR, and Spain.
full_text: Nurturing the brightest talents in international women's football. With continental qualification pathways leading to an exciting finals event, the competition has seen five past champions; USA, Germany, Japan, Korea DPR, and Spain.

title: Women's Olympic Football Tournament
summary: As part of the wider Olympics tournament, this gives nations the chance to put their best 18 person squad forward to compete for the prize. The competition has seen four champions; Norway, Germany, the USA and Canada.
full_text: As part of the wider Olympics tournament, this gives nations the chance to put their best 18 person squad forward to compete for the prize. The competition has seen four champions; Norway, Germany, the USA and Canada.

title: Women’s Club Licensing Workshop sets foundations for global standards
summary: FIFA hosted the first meeting of the FIFA Women’s Club Licensing Working Group at the Home of FIFA in Zurich, Switzerland, earlier this month, bringing together representatives from all six confederations
full_text: FIFA hosted the first meeting of the FIFA Women’s Club Licensing Working Group at the Home of FIFA in Zurich, Switzerland, earlier this month, bringing together representatives from all six confederations
why: FIFA hosts Women’s Club Licensing Workshop to set global standards
headline: FIFA Sets Global Standards for Women's Club Licensing
ai_summary: ফিফা নেত্রী ফুটবল ক্লাব লাইসেন্সিং কাজগুলি নিয়ে কাজ করে এমন গোষ্ঠীর প্রথম সভা আয়োজন করেছে, যেখানে সকল ছয়টি কনফেডারেশনের প্রতিনিধি একত্রিত হয়েছেন। এই কার্যশালাটি নেত্রী ফুটবল ক্লাব লাইসেন্সিং নির্ধারণের জন্য বৈশ্বিক মান নির্ধারণের লক্ষ্য রাখে। এই ধাপটি নেতৃী ফুটবলকে বৈশ্বিকভাবে প্রচারের একটি গুরুত্বপূর্ণ ধাপ।
facebook_caption: FIFA has taken a major step towards promoting women's football globally by hosting the first meeting of the FIFA Women's Club Licensing Working Group. Representatives from all six confederations attended the workshop, which aims to establish global standards for women's football club licensing. This move is expected to boost women's football worldwide.
instagram_caption:
FIFA is setting the stage for women's football success! 🏆💪

title: FIFA delivers Essential Courses in Club Management workshop in Malawi to support professionalisation of domestic game
summary: FIFA has delivered a FIFA Essential Course in Club Management workshop in Lilongwe, Malawi, as part of the African edition of the capacity-building initiative, which comes under the auspices of the FIFA Leagues and Clubs Professionalisation Programme.
full_text: FIFA has delivered a FIFA Essential Course in Club Management workshop in Lilongwe, Malawi, as part of the African edition of the capacity-building initiative, which comes under the auspices of the FIFA Leagues and Clubs Professionalisation Programme.
why: FIFA delivers Essential Courses in Club Management workshop to support professionalisation
headline: FIFA Boosts Malawi Football with Club Management Workshops
ai_summary: ফিফা একটি ক্লাব পরিচালনার কর্মশালা লিলংগুয়ে, মালাউইতে অনুষ্ঠান করেছে এটির লিগ এবং ক্লাব পেশাদারীকরণ প্রোগ্রামের অংশ হিসেবে। এই প্রজেক্টের লক্ষ্য আফ্রিকাতে ঘরোয়া ফুটবল পেশাদারীকরণ করা। কর্মশালাটি দেশীয় ক্লাবকে তাদের পরিচালনা উন্নত করার জন্য একাধিক ক্ষমতার সাথে সজ্জিত করতে সহায়তা করেছে।
facebook_caption: FIFA recently delivered a workshop on Club Management in Lilongwe, Malawi, as part of its efforts to professionalise the domestic game in Africa. The workshop, which was part of the African edition of the FIFA Leagues and Clubs Professionalisation Programme, aimed to equip local clubs with essential skills to improve their management. This is a significant step towards developing football in Malawi and Africa as a whole.
